When this variable appears in the formulary file, it is the FDB dosage form code description for a drug 
product on the formulary. 

SHORT NAME: GCDF_DESC 

LONG NAME: GCDF_DESC 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 40 

SOURCE: First DataBank 

VALUES: Narrative description (e.g., DROPS or TABLET) 

COMMENT: The accompanying FDB code for this description appears in the dosage form code variable (called
